[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000010 1
7 0000010001 2

01 10 0000000010 1 match 6
12 21 0000001001 2
23 32 0010010001 3
34 43 0000000001 1
45 54 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
56 65 0000000010 1 match 6
67 76 0000010000 1
70 07 0000010100 2

02 20 0110010000 3
13 31 0000000011 2
24 42 0000000001 1
35 53 0000000010 1 match 6
46 64 0000000001 1
57 75 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
60 06 0000010010 2
71 17 1000001000 2

03 30 0010010010 3
14 41 0000000001 1
25 52 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
36 63 0000010011 3
47 74 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
50 05 0000000010 1 match 6
61 16 0000000011 2
72 27 0001011000 3

04 40 0000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5
15 51 0000000010 1 match 6
26 62 0000010001 2 match 7
37 73 0000010000 1
